title: Divorce or separation
doc_html:
Art. 3521.  Divorce or separation

A court of this state may grant a divorce or separation only for grounds provided by the law of this state.

Acts 1991, No. 923, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.

Art. 3521.  Divorce or separation
